description: MCP server for Karrito — digital catalog builder with WhatsApp checkout for LATAM entrepreneurs. 30 tools + 5 resources for managing stores, products, orders, discounts, reviews, customers, shipping, and analytics.
rules: Karrito MCP provides 30 tools and 5 resources via Model Context Protocol
Authenticated tools require KARRITO_API_KEY env variable
5 resources available without auth: karrito://pricing, karrito://features, karrito://niches, karrito://competitors, karrito://currencies
All prices support 6 LATAM currencies: DOP, USD, MXN, COP, ARS, BRL
Checkout is via WhatsApp — not traditional payment processing
Free plan: 10 products. Pro $29/mo: 500 products. Lifetime $499: unlimited. Zero commissions.
14-day free Pro trial for all new users — no credit card required
